title: Branding
description: Customize website branding elements including name, icons, and theme colors
siteNameHint: Site name displayed in page titles and about page
logoLightHint: Logo displayed in light theme, recommend transparent SVG or PNG
logoDarkHint: Logo displayed in dark theme, recommend transparent SVG or PNG
themeColorHint: Theme color for PWA and mobile browser address bar

toast.saved: Branding settings saved, page will reload
